rule_metadata.author: David Burkett, @signalblur
rule_metadata.title: Use Of Hidden Paths Or Files

rules.rule_text:
title: Use Of Hidden Paths Or Files
id: 9e1bef8d-0fff-46f6-8465-9aa54e128c1e
related:
- id: d08722cd-3d09-449a-80b4-83ea2d9d4616
  type: similar
status: test
description: Detects calls to hidden files or files located in hidden directories
  in NIX systems.
references:
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1564.001/T1564.001.md
author: David Burkett, @signalblur
date: 2022-12-30
tags:
- attack.privilege-escalation
- attack.persistence
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1574.001
logsource:
  product: linux
  service: auditd
detection:
  selection:
    type: PATH
    name|contains: /.
  filter:
    name|contains:
    - /.cache/
    - /.config/
    - /.pyenv/
    - /.rustup/toolchains
  condition: selection and not filter
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
